steps.title: Find the finite verb
steps.content: The subject is "The word 'flummox,'" and the sentence says when it first did something. The clause needs a finite main verb, not an infinitive or participial phrase.

steps.title: Choose the verb form
steps.content: Choice B is an infinitive, choice C is a present participle, and choice D is a perfect participial phrase. None can serve as the main verb of the sentence. The remaining choice supplies the simple past finite verb needed after the singular subject. The answer is A.
